Video.summary: Vintage Testarossas and Quatra Valve Ferraris don’t just show up on a dealer’s floor, they’re hunted! Adam Merlin, exotic car expert, has spent a lifetime searching for the cars that defined his youth, but nothing is assumed or given in his high stakes game of Risk; A muscle car fiend shows off his private collection to host Skip Smith.
Video.title: Exotic Car Hunter

Video.summary: The word is out that Caffeine & Octane is the major league of North American car shows. Former Atlanta Brave, World Series star, and 10-Time Gold Glove winner Andruw Jones acknowledged the stardom and showed up to show off his 6 wheeled Super Jeep. The state of the art creation took years in planning and execution, but Jones chooses one great event for its debut.
Video.title: Andruw Jones' Super Jeep

Video.summary: The natural landscape of Jekyll Island, GA makes for a great backdrop to showcase the country’s greatest cars. But the ocean air and remoteness of this GA barrier island is no place to leave a painstakingly rebuilt ‘59 Imperial Speedster. Host Skip Smith makes it his mission to locate the talented builder behind this island mystery. Guest host Totem joins Bryan Fuller in the C&O lots to pick out his favorites.
Video.title: Jekyll and Hide

Video.summary: Imagination, ingenuity, and heartache join friends who set out with a simple goal of transforming a ‘35 Plymouth into a running taxi cab. Provenance and passion take center stage as families and friends strive for best in show. Host Rickey Gadson checks out perfect replicas of the original Shelby Cobras and takes Skip and Bryan on ‘borrowed’ taxi ride.
Video.title: Big Yellow Taxi

Video.summary: Call the Peach State Challengers a “car club” and you will quickly be corrected. The defenders of everything Dodge are “family” and they make no excuses for their loyalty to brand and brother. Spend a day at the track with these Challengers and find out what their version of the family photo looks like.
Video.title: Peach State Challengers

Video.summary: Former Jet Ski Champion Ryan Hardwick has succeeded in everything he’s touched in racing and business, so why not race Lamborghinis! Hardwick has found rapid success with his high tech training methods; he shares his secrets with host Rickey Gadson in this episode of C&O.
Video.title: Lambo Racer

Video.summary: The ghouls have problems with after-market parts for the 400 Magnum V8. Allysa begins working in the shop, and two rare Mopars are disassembled
Video.title: 400 Magnum Misfire

Video.summary: Ray finds a Gurney Eagle in a garage on Long Island. He wants to put the coveted machine back on the track at Indy to honor Dan Gurney. After intense restoration and scouring the globe for a Gurney-Westlake engine, the Eagle soars again.
Video.title: DAN GURNEY

Video.summary: Ray uncovers the infamous “Brawner Hawk” – from the Dean Van Lines team – that became the breakout car in the career of Mario Andretti. Ray enlists HOF mechanic Jim McGee to restore the vehicle and, along the way, discovers a replica with many of the car’s original parts. After an award winning stop at Concours Amelia Island, the car heads to the 100th running of Indy 500 where Mario Andretti himself gets behind the wheel.
Video.title: VINTAGE RACING

Video.summary: Dale Earnhardt Jr. wants Ray to help restore an El Camino, except add on a Laguna front end. It’s not a typical restoration, but it’s certainly a NASCAR performance-worthy restoration. Ray and the team build the car and then, in a bit of gamesmanship, challenge Kyle Tucker, owner of Detroit Speed, to a series of races against his award winning Camaro. But as always, Ray has an ace up his sleeve in Al Unser, Jr. as his driver.
Video.title: TWO JUNIORS

Video.summary: In the late 60s, Camaros, Mustangs, and Corvettes roared to the forefront of the muscle car world. When Ray gets offered a spot in a vintage race featuring these cars, he’s propelled to dive into their history and afforded a chance to get behind the wheel at the Brickyard. But because it is a pro-am race, Ray pulls in a partner – none other than Bill Elliott, aka “Awesome Bill from Dawsonville.”
Video.title: MACHINE MAGIC MARIO

Video.summary: Everyone has a car they fell in love with. Maybe it was the first? Maybe it was the hot rod the guy down the street owned? In Ray’s case, it was the ’58 Chevy he saw in the iconic coming of age car movie, American Graffiti. When Ray gets the chance to own the car after years and years of pursuit, he jumps on it. But restoring the car to its "movie state" proves to be a grueling task that goes way beyond a typical build. But when it's you first love, you can't let her down.
Video.title: HOLLYWOOD MAKEOVER

Video.summary: The premiere episode features a dive into the influence cars had on culture of California. From road racing in the 1940’s to the inception of the iconic Woody wagon on the California beach scene, automobiles undoubtedly shaped the West Coast attitude. Ray talks to The Beach Boys frontman Mike Love and surfing icon Laird Hamilton for a glimpse into the cars that are so connected to surfing culture.
Video.title: WOODIE WAGONS

Video.summary: Ray uncovers the secrets of America’s greatest racing sport in the foothills of North Carolina. When moonshiners were looking to outrun police officers, they would custom fit engines to race the back woods tracks. That sport eventually evolved into NASCAR and Ray talks to the early adopters of this national pastime.
Video.title: MOONSHINE

Video.summary: Grammy-winning musician Marty Robbins lived a double life, flawlessly crossing between the glitz of the Grand Ole Opry and track at Talladega. One of few musicians to ever achieve success in both genres, Ray is determined to return Marty’s iconic 777 car to the race track travel back to the 60’s and 70’s.
Video.title: MARTY ROBBINS

Video.summary: Legendary drag racer Don “The Snake” Prudhomme proves he is no stranger to the thrill of racing rivalry. Prudhomme’s career and subsequent competition with driver Tom “The Mongoose” McEwan earned the pair an unforgettable imprint on American pop culture. Legions of kids in the 60’s and 70’s flocked to the shelves for Snake and Mongoose Matchbox cars which helped make drag racing an undisputable American pastime. Famed director Ron Howard makes an appearance to discuss the incredible stories hidden within the world of Formula 1 Racing, the topic of his latest, epic feature ‘Rush”.
Video.title: HOT RODS

Video.summary: Ray finds Buried Treasures in the form of two race cars that had been left almost completely untouched since the last time they were on a race track. One is found sitting in a barn with the other trapped in an old car hauler. Upon uncovering the cars, we find both have big stories to tell.
Video.title: BURIED TREASURE

Video.summary: A journey to Indianapolis unveils the winning car of the 1955 Indy 500 sits on the roof of an auto mechanic shop. More than 50 years after it’s magic at the track, prominent Indy mechanic/owner Chris Paulsen begins to restore the car and Ray talks about the evolution of America’s illustrious Indy 500.
Video.title: INDY RESCUE

Video.summary: In the 1960s, Smokey Yunick, the most innovative mechanic in NASCAR history, sold his famous truck that hauled equipment & cars across the country. Ray is on a mission to uncover this storied truck that helped launch the beginning of NASCAR’s cross-country popularity.
Video.title: SMOKEY

Video.summary: Caffeine & Octane is known for having something for everyone. That reputation is tested when over 100 VW’s, on the lunatic fringe of automotive, rattled into an event. The annual VW Invasion has swarmed C&O, bringing with it Bugs, Beetles, Buses and more by a very dedicated VW fan base.
Video.title: Beetles, Bugs, and Buses, Oh My!

Image.alt: Beetles, Bugs, and Buses, Oh My!
Beetles, Bugs, and Buses, Oh My!
Beetles, Bugs, and Buses, Oh My!

Video.summary: Rapper, radio, and ATL TV personality Darian “Big Tigger” Morgan invites Caffeine & Octane into his home. Cameras look past his collection of 500 Michael Jordan shoes to focus their lenses on a one-off motorcycle the 6–time NBA Champion gave to Tigger as a gift; A second to none, muscle car collection by one of the founders of Monster Energy gets toured by one of our hosts.
Video.title: Big Tigger v. Monster Muscle

Video.summary: Mark's coffee addiction is spotlighted, and the ghouls work on a 1970 Challenger.
Video.title: Return of the '70 Sunroof Challenger

Video.summary: Work on a 1970 Cuda 340 is featured.
Video.title: 70 'Cuda Grace

Video.summary: The ghouls work on a 1968 GTX for Bill Goldberg, and Mark repairs a Challenger deck lid. Will paints a 1967 Hemi GTX and challenges Mark to a paint-off.
Video.title: Hemi Orange is the New Corporate Blue

Image.alt: Hemi Orange is the New Corporate Blue
Hemi Orange is the New Corporate Blue
Hemi Orange is the New Corporate Blue

Video.summary: Mark teaches Allysa to analyze and document cars in preparation for disassembly, but she later has a crucial lapse in judgement. The ghouls install the 400 Magnum in the 1972 Dodge Charger.
Video.title: Grand Theft Hemi

Video.summary: Two rare Mopars, a Daytona survivor and early Hemi Charger, are analyzed for authenticity and restoration.
Video.title: Investigation O.E.

Video.summary: The ghouls complete the 1970 V-Code Challenger and make a side-by-side comparison with Mark's 2014 Shaker-hood Challenger.
Video.title: Chally vs. Chally

Video.summary: A 1970 Hemi Charger is restored.
Video.title: HEMI FK5 Alive

Video.summary: The 1970 Hemi Charger project is completed in the season finale.
Video.title: Pitch and Rides

Video.summary: If you want to know what makes a low center of gravity so important on a Jeep, then you won’t want to miss this episode.
Video.title: Low Center JK

Video.summary: Our rock buggy chassis is ready for some major components, we’re going to bolt on some headers, cut holes for gauges, and even make mounts for a fuel cell.
Video.title: Rock Buggy

Video.summary: Bruno and Matt show you what to look for when repairing body panels on your old truck.
Video.title: C-10 Body Panels

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno put an S-10 on bags to give the truck a more improved look with better handling.
Video.title: Slammed S-10

Video.summary: The guys outfit a UTV Chase Truck to make sure their Race UTV can make it to the finish line.
Video.title: UTV Chase Truck

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno work on a vintage C-10 with a few modern conveniences.
Video.title: Patina C-10

Video.summary: Don’t miss this episode of Truck U, when Matt and Bruno transform a modern Jeep LJ into a vintage Cj-8 scrambler.
Video.title: Modern Scrambler

Video.summary: See what it takes to rebuild a Turbo in a 7.3L Diesel on this episode of Truck U.
Video.title: Turbo Rebuild

Video.summary: Nick Rutter, along with special guest Bruno Massel, walks you through step-by-step on how to perform a waterless wash, clay and polish, applying a sealant, and finishing with a topcoat wax on a brand-new car.
Video.title: Detailing a Brand New Car Part 1

Image.alt: Detailing a Brand New Car Part 1
Detailing a Brand New Car Part 1
Detailing a Brand New Car Part 1

Video.summary: Nick Rutter provides valuable tips and techniques for cleaning and rejuvenating your cars interior
Video.title: Interior Car Care
